who: paralegals in law firms managing 5–15 cases/month
offer: For paralegals in law firms processing 5–15 cases/month, missed deadlines cause compliance issues. We generate compliance reminder emails instead of manual tracking.
problem: Difficulty in tracking legal case deadlines and ensuring compliance.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for paralegals seeking solutions
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to paralegals with a demo video
Participate in community forums for sharing tools
try_it: Let users try deadline tracking and email reminders on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with a CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
